summary: POST-MERGE REGRESSION TEST (apdate merge) completed. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Public pages load correctly, manager cabinet works, but admin login has UI issue. Zero 500 errors detected. All key APIs respond 2xx. Authentication works for all 4 roles via API.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin login form submission does not redirect to /admin dashboard. Form stays on /cabinet/login page after clicking 'SIGN IN' button with valid credentials (admin@bibi.cars / Jp3FS_7ZuE2bhHp7rFkJm9B9T_TeiHxu). Backend API /api/auth/login works correctly (verified via curl), so this is a frontend form handling issue.

integration_issues.issue: Deal cards on welcome page (/) do not have data-testid attributes as expected by Card1 component code. Found 0 cards with data-testid='deal-card-*' but 88 article/card elements exist. This suggests cards are rendering but without proper test IDs.
Catalog page cards do not have clickable links to /cars/:vin detail pages. Selector 'a[href*="/cars/"]' returns no results on /catalog page.

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login via API - 200 + JWT + role:admin
Backend: Manager login via API - 200 + JWT + role:manager
Backend: Teamlead login via API - 200 + 2FA challenge (email_otp) + role:team_lead
Backend: Customer login via API - 200 + accessToken + role:customer
Backend: Auth edge cases - wrong password → 401, missing token → 401, invalid token → 401, no 500 errors
Backend: Google reviews - 32 reviews, 4.9 avg rating
Backend: Admin Google reviews moderation endpoint - 200
Backend: No duplicate VINs in vehicles endpoint
Frontend: Welcome page (/) loads - hero 'FROM AUCTION TO KEYS' visible, brand logos visible (Audi, BMW, Jeep, Toyota, Ford, Hyundai)
Frontend: Catalog page (/catalog) loads - content visible, filters present, vehicle cards render
Frontend: Mobile responsive (414x896) - welcome page renders, hero visible, mobile menu button visible
Frontend: Manager cabinet login - successful redirect to /manager workspace, dashboard renders with Health-Score, User Engagement, Top Deals, Hot Leads, Tasks, Payments, Shipments sections
Frontend: No critical JavaScript errors (only expected 401s for unauthenticated favorites/compare API calls)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin login form submission on /cabinet/login - form does not redirect to /admin after successful API authentication. Backend API works correctly (verified), so this is a frontend form handler or redirect logic issue. Also investigate why deal cards on welcome page don't have data-testid attributes and why catalog cards lack clickable links to detail pages.

success_percentage.frontend: ~75% (public pages load, manager cabinet works, but admin login UI broken, deal cards missing test IDs, catalog navigation incomplete)
